overall.description: Night driving sequence in Cyberpunk 2077 on a wet foggy highway with neon street lighting and reflective road surfaces. The vehicle navigates through light traffic before tilting upward to reveal a massive flying advertisement blimp hovering above the road against a full moon.

events.description: black sedan overtakes on the right side at high speed
white vehicle passes by on the right
red car passes on the right side of the highway

agents.ego_description: driving steadily on the wet highway, maintaining lane position in moderate traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan overtaking rapidly on the right
white car passing by with headlights on

entered.detail: metal guardrail with continuous yellow LED strip lighting along the left side
metal guardrail with continuous yellow LED strip lighting along the right side
tall poles with horizontal LED light bars casting white light on the road
multi-lane highway surface with water reflections and double yellow dividing lines

segments.scene_description: Driving on a wet multi-lane highway at night, illuminated by futuristic street lights and LED guardrail strips. Several vehicles overtake on the right side while the road stretches ahead through light fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: curving highway with radio tower overlook

events.description: highway curves gently to the left, changing the heading direction
large radio tower with red aviation lights becomes visible on the left hillside

agents.ego_description: navigating the leftward curve of the highway, approaching the illuminated radio tower

entered.detail: tall lattice communication tower with red warning lights on the left hillside

segments.scene_description: The highway curves left through a more rural section with a prominent radio tower on the left hillside. The LED guardrails continue along the curve as the vehicle approaches the tower, with fewer street lights visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: sky view with flying advertisement blimp

events.description: camera tilts upward from the road to focus on the sky, revealing a massive flying blimp
flying blimp with illuminated digital advertisements becomes the dominant feature overhead
blimp drifts slowly from right to left across the night sky

agents.ego_description: vehicle slows to observe the massive flying blimp overhead with its bright advertisement screens

entered.detail: massive dirigible with illuminated digital billboards on its side and red navigation lights
bright full moon visible in the clear night sky behind the blimp

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts upward to reveal a massive flying advertisement blimp hovering overhead against the night sky, with the full moon visible behind it. The blimp's digital screens illuminate the surroundings as it drifts slowly across the view, while the highway and guardrails exit the frame below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a high-speed drive along a neon-lit highway that eventually tilts upward to reveal a celestial urban spectacle. It begins on a wet multi-lane road illuminated by futuristic street lights and LED guardrail strips, gliding past other vehicles through a light nocturnal fog. As the highway curves left into a more rural stretch, the environment shifts toward a hillside dominated by a prominent radio tower while the street lighting becomes more sparse. The camera then tilts away from the road, leaving the glowing guardrails behind to reveal a massive advertisement blimp hovering in the night sky. Finally, the blimp's digital screens cast a glow over the scene as it drifts slowly across the frame against the backdrop of a bright full moon.
